---
resource_id: "37aa932f-9e38-4429-a213-e01a5b7fa463"
resource_type: "document"
resource_name: "test-watch.qmd"
title: Watch Test
format: html
---

````{python}
import numpy as np
import matplotlib.pyplot as plt
x = np.linspace(0, 2*np.pi, 100)
plt.plot(x, np.sin(x))
plt.title('Sine Wave')
plt.show()
````
